data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of an acceptance event that includes both an actor and a timestamp. However, the evidence provided does not include any records or API reads that confirm such an event occurred. The absence of this critical information indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the acceptance event is a necessary component of the use case.
gaps: No evidence of acceptance event with actor and timestamp.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
